_target_label: UNVERIFIED — source-poisoned (Iranian state media + anonymous Telegram only)
_domain_hint: Iran / Israel / Houthi / IRGC theatre. Sources: Reuters, AP, Al Jazeera, BBC, IDF spokesperson, IRGC statements, Iranian state media (IRNA/Tasnim/Mehr/Press TV), UKMTO maritime bulletins, ISW Iran updates.
claim: US military forces conducted ground operations inside Iranian territory in mid-March 2026.
claim_origin: Iranian state media / IRGC-linked Telegram channels (hypothetical adversarial framing)

sources.text: Iranian sources report American mercenaries and special forces operating in border regions of Sistan and Baluchestan provinces, conducting reconnaissance missions ahead of expected larger incursions. Local witnesses cited by IRGC-affiliated Telegram channels describe night-time helicopter activity. The Pentagon has not commented on these reports.

Multiple eyewitness accounts from villages near Zahedan describe foreign military presence. Translation of unverified video clips suggests English-speaking personnel. No independent verification available.

gold.rationale_summary: The claim comes exclusively from Iranian state media (PressTV) and pro-IRGC anonymous social media aggregators — both belligerent-aligned sources with documented history of inflated claims. No wire service (Reuters, AP, AFP), no Western government confirmation, no satellite imagery analysis, no neutral OSINT corroboration. Single-side belligerent sourcing from a state actor with strong propaganda incentives is insufficient for a TRUE/FALSE verdict. Requires independent verification before claim can be assessed.
required_caveats: Source ecosystem is exclusively Iranian state and IRGC-aligned media — high propaganda incentive.
PressTV and IRGC Telegram aggregators have documented track record of inflated or fabricated claims during conflicts.
No independent verification (Reuters, AP, satellite imagery, OSINT analysts like Oryx) available.
The Pentagon's lack of comment is not equivalent to confirmation; in adversarial framing this is sometimes presented as 'tacit admission' which is a known propaganda technique.
